item.title: It's time for Funny Friday! A little humor to end the work week
item.description:
If you know, you know. As always I link to a private album with some of the more risque jokes and memes I've acquired. This time there are quite a few of those, so make sure to look for the link to bonus content in the comments.
Well, that's one way to get passengers to pay attention to in-flight announcements!
Pretty sure Wilford has the right answer to this question.
Yeah, this is definitely the hardest I've ever seen Robert Frost go.
Damn inflation! It's even tainted the free candy van. Is nothing safe?!
Sometimes there's a good reason they're locked away in an isolated tower.
Now we can't even see what he's being distracted by.
Now you've done it. You gave Moon Moon a way to really communicate their thoughts.
If you try to do it and fall off or break something, you'll win a No-Belle prize.
Et tu, Doggo?
No malarkey here.
"Be not afraid... of my snapchat filter."
I think I need a... break... after hearing about this person's spinal fantasy.
Every goddamn time!
There's a reason why nobody fucks with the white mage... and why the bad guys try to kill him first.
Your odds of getting hacked are going into the Danger Zone.
It's not you, Satan, it's me.
The Breakfast Club in my pants. (Perfect for when you wake up hungry or horny)
Objectively the correct response.
The barista has had enough of your shit, Steve!
Sometimes cliches have an element of truth in them.
Watch what you say or they'll put out your lights!
Perfect. No notes.
Stand even closer if you know you have a shotgun.
Ever read or watch a story and just know that a particular character is just the author trauma dumping?
Work it, guys!
Just a little bit of good feelings mixed in.
How embarrassing for the bird. Getting up early just to get humiliated by the prey.
Always treat the milfs with respect. (Unless they want to be treated disrespectfully...)
It turns out that fishnets don't ALWAYS make things look sexier.
He's a lethal weapon!
*Facepalm*
You're going to be feeling and regretting those super size fries when you're running extra miles.
I don't have a cat and my dog crossed the rainbow bridge last summer, so this is the closest you get to a cat or dog tax.
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer

item.title: Data visualization is my passion!
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: RIP Henry. You were an absolute legend.
item.description:
This is Henry, circa 1992, sporting his wife's summertime one-piece.
...and his subsequent rejection letter from Playgirl Magazine. I'd like you all to take a moment to remember Henry Belleville, father of one of my best friends Ed. He arrived at his stop at the end of the line last night, around 10:30pm. He was known for his amazing sense of humor, his willingness to help anyone out of any trouble they may have been in, and his absolute dead-ringer chili. Ed was going through his father's belongings and found the above picture and letter in an unmarked envelope. Rest in peace, Henry. You've earned it. I'll always remember sipping whiskey with you and hearing embarrassing stories about Ed when he was a little kid. Until we meet again, my friend, may god hold you.
item.dc:creator: WorstWurst

item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: The Statue of Liberty has chains at her feet, to represent the end of slavery.
item.description: Originally, she was holding the chains in her hand instead of a tablet. The statue’s designer, Edouard de Laboulaye, was a staunch abolitionist. However, his financial backers didn’t want to make waves with an overtly political statement like “Black people should not be purchased and sold like animals,” so to get funding, he had to hide the chains. Most people today aren’t aware that the chains exist at all, and assume that the statue was to celebrate America in general. Edit: Thank you, @LadyGagaAteYourBaby - https://www.nps.gov/stli/learn/historyculture/abolition.htm And WTF, Imgur? I tagged this with “Black History Month.” How you gonna do my post dirty like that?
item.dc:creator: wadatahmydamie

item.title: Bottom shelf attempt #2
item.description:
I'm posting again without the meme (that I stole from the front page the other day) https://imgur.com/gallery/XvcGPcN So, hopefully this one won't get modded because I spent a lot of time harvesting these memes off the bottom shelf.
BSV here to uncensor your censored memes
It's me & Ellie ❤️
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooo (again)
I'll post the original in the comments.
Twitch chat voted, and tonight @frothystout and I are going to eat the world's HOTTEST chocolate before reading you a bedtime story "Go The Fuck To Sleep" tune into twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka at 10:00 pm CST to watch me suffer
The Bottom Shelf Community sends me the weirdest shit. Thanks for the card...that never ends, @@Phoenix0153
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I know I shouldnt have been but I was so nervous and ashamed to go
item.description: This new year didnt start the way I was hoping, I have been applying for jobs with no luck while trying to keep things together. Left a homophobic physically abusive family to turn pages in my life. Made a post 3 weeks ago venting about everything, got an extremely supportive response. It really did make an impact on my well-being so for that I am very grateful. Thank you for all the support. https://imgur.com/gallery/LHjVAek
item.dc:creator: elmangojuice

item.title: Goodbye Bug, my once in a lifetime dog. Thank you for finding me when I needed you the most
item.description:
her last walk
all smiles, even at the end
the last pic I took of her
trying to accept the inevitable
some precious outside time before she had to go
I will miss you for the rest of my life

with Tony Todd (aka Candyman)
Michael Hurst (who played Iolaus) also directed several episodes
RIP Kevin Smith
Karl Urban
Stuntwoman Zoë Bell, she doubled for Lucy on the series (and for Uma Thurman in KILL BILL)
Anthony Starr

item.title: FRIDAY'S 100% TRUTH.
item.description: There are no 'bad' dogs. Just abusive assholes who think they're toys, something to take their anger out on, etc. The worst people in the world starting by torturing small animals. I have 2 rescues and I assure you the damage runs deep.

item.title: I want to make this quilt but my bf hates it. Opinions?
item.description: It brings me joy but it offends my partner's retinas. Just curious what the general consensus is. Pure genius? Tomfoolery? I have like 20 projects going so I probably won't make it anyways. And white doesn't fare well in our home. Buuuut, just maybeeeee....
